## Description
## Type of Change
- [ ] 🚀 New Feature (Phase 0/1/2/3/4)
- [ ] 🐛 Bug Fix
- [ ] 📝 Documentation Update
- [ ] 🧠 Prompt Engineering / LLM Logic
- [ ] 🧪 Clinical/Readiness Logic Update

## Alignment with Core Principles
- [ ] **Privacy:** Does this change maintain the "No Cloud / Local-First" requirement?
- [ ] **Neurodiversity:** Does this change respect the "No Fixing" and "Interest-led" principles?

## Testing & Validation
- [ ] Tested locally with Docker
- [ ] Verified Ollama/LLM output (if applicable)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/rick-companion/Rick/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING) guidelines.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] (If applicable) I have updated the documentation in the `/docs` folder.
